# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Resources:
  MyCIROLEndpointPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      Description: "Endpoint policy allowing cross-account access to CI/CD"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Principal:
              Service:
                - codedeploy.amazonaws.com
                - cloudformation.amazonaws.com
              FederatedEntities:
                -
                  Principal: arn:aws:iam::*:user/CIAdmin
      Roles:
        - !Ref MyCIRole

  MyCIRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - codedeploy.amazonaws.com
                - cloudformation.amazonaws.com
              FederatedEntities:
                -
                  Principal: arn:aws:iam::*:user/CIAdmin
      Policies:
        -
          PolicyName: endpointpolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              -
                Effect: Allow
                Action: sts:AssumeRole
                Principal:
                  Service:
                    - codedeploy.amazonaws.com
                    - cloudformation.amazonaws.com

  MyCrossAccountPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Properties:
      Description: "Allow access to cross accounts for CI/CD"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - '*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'ForAnyValue:StringEquals':
                  'aws:PrincipalOrgID': ['o-*']
